name: Jan's Crescent Cookies
recipeInstructions:
We prefer to use pecans. Walnuts work well also.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Cream butter, add sugar and continue to cream. Add flour, mix in nuts. Form into crescent-shaped cookies and place on lightly greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes. While cookies are cooling, mix powdered sugar and cinnamon. Roll cookies in sugar/cinnamon mixture.
